privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Escherichia coli 16S rRNA gene sequence containing 3 reads, with Read 2 reverse-complemented. The expected output consensus path is /home/ga/UGENE_Data/16s_assembly/results/16s_consensus.fasta, and the report path is /home/ga/UGENE_Data/16s_assembly/results/assembly_report.txt. The true length of the generated sequence is 1540 base pairs, which is correctly bounded between 1500 and 1560 as required.
